expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: historical analogs become required-before-ship gates
expectations.evidence: The outputs state the Phase 5b contract/rubric requires analog gating, but do not show any Phase 5b artifact where it is actually enforced for this case: “Could not verify execution because no Phase 5b artifacts (checkpoint_audit, checkpoint_delta, Phase 5b draft) are present in the retrospective evidence.” Therefore the case focus is not demonstrably covered in produced Phase 5b outputs.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: The run output acknowledges Phase 5b alignment cannot be demonstrated because required Phase 5b outputs are missing: “Phase 5b required outputs are missing from the provided evidence; therefore alignment cannot be demonstrated.” The provided fixtures are described as a defect-analysis run, not a Phase 5b checkpoint run.
